message:
Multiple regression fixes and enhancements

- Console: Honor PrintOptions width/justify/overflow/no_wrap in print_to
- Table: Fix caption and title alignment width to match table width
- Table: Preserve span styles in title/caption rendering
- Panel: Improve title/subtitle rendering with span preservation
- Rule: Fix title alignment width consistency
- Tree: Fix highlight combining with span styles
- Syntax: Minor improvements
- Terminal: Safer env var testing with EnvSettings struct

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
